hero.body: decreos turns a group chat into a polity - votes, offices, invitations, and an official record that outlives the feed.

method.body: Less explanation. More gravity. Four reasons a friend group earns the weight of an institution.
method.featureBody: The decision gets a place to stand.

articles.title: A place
articles.body: A room with a name has a different gravity. Convene where it counts.

articles.title: An official record
articles.body: Not a vibe check. An entry the group can return to and cite.

articles.title: A memory
articles.body: Offices, votes, and amendments stay visible enough to matter.

articles.title: A ritual
articles.body: Friends stay unserious without making every choice disposable.

record.title: Social media forgets. The record does not.
record.body: Motions, votes, offices, invitations, admissions, and amendments are entered, numbered, and kept. Some things should survive the feed.

name.label: Name your polity
examples: The Council for Very Minor Decisions
The Committee to Decide Where We Eat

government.title: Start with the standard republic.
government.description: A fast default government with elected offices, typed powers, and no permanent founder rule.

standardRepublic.label: Standard Republic
standardRepublic.copy: Assembly rule, elected offices, appeal rights, and a short bootstrap Steward.
standardRepublic.description: The recommended setup keeps the government moving with elections, appeals, and bounded bootstrap authority.

fast.label: Fast
fast.description: A 7-day bootstrap and one-day ordinary votes for groups that meet often.

standard.label: Standard
standard.description: A 14-day bootstrap with two-day ordinary votes that move quickly without surprising members.

deliberate.label: Deliberate
deliberate.description: A 30-day bootstrap and four-day ordinary votes for groups that need slower proceedings.

visibility.title: Choose the door.
visibility.description: Public appears in discovery. Private stays out of discovery.
visibility.label: Access

public.label: Public
public.description: Lets people find and read what is happening.

invites.title: Invite the first people.
invites.description: One or two invitations is enough to begin.
invites.label: Person to invite

ready.title: {{name}} is ready.
ready.description: The founding room is prepared. Enter and convene.

errors.emailDuplicate: That person is already on the list.
